description: A wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac by wrangler perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt.Length: 85 cmMade of genuine leather for durabilityTang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeBranding embossed on the tail end for styleCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
